creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-04-27 07:36:45 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/tuxguitar      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    audio/tuxguitar/files patch-build-freebsd.xml 
                          patch-build.properties 
  Log:
  With TuxGuitar, you will be able to compose music using the following features
  
      * Tablature editor
      * Score Viewer
      * Multitrack display
      * Autoscroll while playing
      * Note duration management
      * Various effects (bend, slide, vibrato, hammer-on/pull-off)
      * Support for triplets (5,6,7,9,10,11,12)
      * Repeat open and close
      * Time signature management
      * Tempo management
      * Imports and exports gp3,gp4 and gp5 files
  
  WWW: http://www.tuxguitar.com.ar/
  
  PR:             ports/112169
  Submitted by:   Pietro Cerutti (gahr at gahr.ch)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.855     +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +39 -0     ports/audio/tuxguitar/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/tuxguitar/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +63 -0     ports/audio/tuxguitar/files/patch-build-freebsd.xml (new)
  1.1       +64 -0     ports/audio/tuxguitar/files/patch-build.properties (new)
  1.1       +17 -0     ports/audio/tuxguitar/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +165 -0    ports/audio/tuxguitar/pkg-plist (new)
